data.title: New Brr-Nana Slurpee now available at 7-Eleven stores nationwide - banana flavor makes a comeback!
data.description: A popular frozen treat is now available in stores across the country, so make sure to get your hands on one before they sell out! The nostalgic banana flavor is making a comeback after demands from Slurpee drink enthusiasts. This news comes from Irving, Texas, as of February 18, 2026.

data.title: ProPetro Holding (NYSE: PUMP) beats Q4 earnings estimate by 107.69%, reports EPS of $0.01 vs. estimated $-0.13, with revenue down $30.88 million.
data.description: ProPetro Holding (NYSE: PUMP) published its Q4 financial results on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, at 07:00 AM. The notable points from the report include surpassing estimated earnings by 107.69%, with an EPS of $0.01 compared to an anticipated $-0.13. Additionally, revenue experienced a decline of $30.88 million from the previous year. In previous earnings, the company had also exceeded expectations on EPS. More details can be found at Benzinga.com.

data.title: LCI Industries (NYSE: LCII) beat Q4 earnings estimate by 27.14% with EPS of $0.89. Revenue increased by $129.56 million.
data.description: LCI Industries (NYSE: LCII) announced their Q4 earnings on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, at 07:00 AM. They surpassed estimated earnings by 27.14%, with an EPS of $0.89 compared to the estimated $0.7. Revenue showed a significant increase of $129.56 million from the previous year. This marked a strong performance for LCI Industries. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Moodys (NYSE: MCO) beats Q4 earnings with EPS of $3.64 (beat by 5.51%) and revenue up by $217.00 million compared to last year.
data.description: Moodys (NYSE: MCO) released its Q4 earnings report on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, at 07:00 AM. The report revealed that Moodys surpassed estimated earnings by 5.51%, with an EPS of $3.64 compared to the estimated $3.45. Additionally, their revenue increased by $217.00 million compared to the same period the previous year. In the previous quarter, the company exceeded EPS expectations by $0.23, resulting in a 1.38% increase. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AcuityMD releases AcuityMD for Salesforce on Salesforce AppExchange, enhancing commercial team capabilities. Fasten sales goals.
data.description: AcuityMD, a MedTech company based in Boston, has recently introduced AcuityMD for Salesforce on the Salesforce AppExchange platform. This new integration allows customers to effectively merge AcuityMD's platform with Salesforce, enabling commercial teams to streamline their processes. By utilizing accurate data, AI-driven insights, and user-friendly workflows, AcuityMD aims to assist commercial teams in identifying opportunities, researching and prioritizing targets, and achieving sales targets more efficiently. This collaboration is set to enhance the speed and effectiveness of commercial operations.

data.title: Openlane (OPLN) missed Q4 estimated earnings by -10.71%, EPS at $0.25 vs $0.28 estimate, revenue up $39.30M from last year.
data.description: Openlane (NYSE: OPLN) unveiled its Q4 financial results on February 18, 2026, at 07:00 AM. The key takeaways from the report indicate that Openlane fell short of estimated earnings by -10.71%, revealing an EPS of $0.25 compared to the expected $0.28. Furthermore, revenue surged by $39.30 million year-over-year. In terms of its historical earnings, the company outperformed expectations on EPS by $0.07. For more details, access the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: New initiative aims to scale modern cooking technologies in Africa with the help of Rockefeller Foundation and other partners. Over 1 billion people in Africa rely on traditional fuels, such as wood and charcoal. The initiative seeks to expand access to cleaner cooking methods.
data.description: A new Clean Cooking Accelerator Initiative was introduced at the 2026 IEA Ministerial meeting with a focus on Africa, where around 1 billion individuals depend on traditional fuels like wood and charcoal. The initiative aims to enhance access to cleaner and healthier cooking techniques by bolstering supply chains.

data.title: Intracom Telecom introduces UltraLink-GX80 with 15Gbps in the US for wireless transport needs.
data.description: Intracom Telecom, a leading global provider of technology systems and solutions, made public the launch of its UltraLink™-GX80 Advanced E-Band radio in the United States on February 18, 2026. This advanced radio offers impressive speeds of up to 15 Gbps in each direction, catering to the increasing demands of wireless transport solutions in the country.

data.title: monday.com to participate in Morgan Stanley conference on March 2nd, 2026 at 4:05pm PT. Management to discuss recent events.
data.description: In New York and Tel Aviv, Israel, monday.com (NASDAQ: MNDY), the AI work platform specializing in strategy execution at scale, disclosed its management team's involvement in the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 2, 2026, at 4:05pm PT. The presentation will discuss recent developments in a fireside chat format and will be streamed live on monday.com’s investor relations website at http://ir.monday.com. A recording of the presentation will also be available.

data.title: Global Payments appoints Vivek Sankaran as new independent director to Board of Directors. $GPN #businessnews
data.description: In Atlanta, Global Payments Inc. (NYSE: GPN) revealed the addition of Vivek Sankaran as a fresh independent director to its Board of Directors.

data.title: Starboard Value LP sends letter to Riot Platforms urging changes, significant stockholder of NASDAQ: RIOT company.
data.description: A large shareholder of Riot Platforms, Inc. named Starboard Value LP, has recently sent a letter to Riot Platforms' CEO, Jason Les, and Executive Chairman, Benjamin Yi, as well as to the Company's Board of Directors. Riot Platforms is listed on NASDAQ with the ticker symbol RIOT. Starboard Value LP and its affiliates hold a significant stake in the company. The letter's complete contents can be accessed for more details.

data.title: TASKING announces new tools for timing analysis of multicore designs, enhancing accuracy of worst-case execution time assessment.
data.description: MUNICH-- TASKING, a prominent player in high-performance embedded software tools, has unveiled upgrades to its comprehensive toolset, offering improved timing analysis for real-time, multicore embedded systems. By incorporating TASKING’s compiler tech, BlueBox debuggers, winIDEA IDE, and the LDRA tool suite, developers gain a deeper understanding of intricate timing challenges like worst-case execution time (WCET) in line with industry benchmarks. This integration enhances the ability to assess complex timing issues more precisely.

data.title: Docebo Inc. plans to repurchase up to US$60M of its common shares at US$20.40 per share in substantial issuer bid.
data.description: In Toronto, Docebo Inc., a prominent learning platform provider, announced details about its substantial issuer bid. The company, listed on NASDAQ as DCBO and TSX as DCBO, plans to repurchase and cancel up to US$60 million of its common shares at a rate of US$20.40 per share. Known for its expertise in artificial intelligence, Docebo continues to focus on innovation in the learning industry.

data.title: ActiveCampaign offers Results Guarantee for new customers: full refund if no instant results in first month.
data.description: ActiveCampaign, the marketing platform based in Chicago, recently unveiled a Results Guarantee for new users. Unlike traditional refund policies, this guarantee promises immediate results to customers. If users do not see the desired outcomes within the first month for any reason, they are eligible for a full refund. Most platforms typically require businesses to spend 30 days learning their system, but ActiveCampaign aims to enhance marketing results right from the start. This initiative reflects their commitment to customer satisfaction and effectiveness in the AI era.

data.title: Two Prime registers as CTA with CFTC and NFA, expanding services for institutional investors in bitcoin.
data.description: Two Prime Inc., a company offering bitcoin financial services to institutional investors, has recently registered with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) as a commodity trading advisor (CTA) and is now a Member of the National Futures Association (NFA). This registration enables Two Prime to enhance its range of services and attract more institutional clients. The move comes as bitcoin gains traction as a mainstream asset class.

data.title: Pyxus International attains CDP Leadership status for climate change and forestry; a global environmental leader.
data.description: Pyxus International, Inc. (OTCID: PYYX), a worldwide agricultural company based in Morrisville, North Carolina, has been acknowledged by CDP for its exceptional performance in addressing climate change and forestry. This recognition solidifies Pyxus as a prominent figure in environmental stewardship, highlighting the company's commitment to sustainability practices. The recognition comes from the significant strides Pyxus has made in reducing its carbon footprint and promoting transparency regarding its environmental impact. This recognition underscores the company's dedication to meeting global climate goals.

data.title: New update to ezAccounting Software adds support for Qualified Tips and Qualified Overtime 2026 Rule, helping SMBs stay compliant.
data.description: In a recent development, a software enhancement known as OBBBA has been introduced to assist Small and Medium-Sized Businesses (SMBs) and accountants in ensuring compliance with regulations while streamlining payroll and tax reporting processes. The updated 2026 ezAccounting software, released by Halfpricesoft.com in REDMOND, Wash. on Feb. 18, 2026, incorporates this enhancement to facilitate smoother operations. This move aims to help users navigate changes such as the new Qualified Tips and Qualified rules more efficiently. The software update is designed to provide necessary support to users, making it easier to manage various aspects of their financial activities.
